steps.title: Distribute the negative sign
steps.content: Rewrite the subtraction by distributing the negative sign to each term in the second group: $$7x^3 + 7x - 6x^3 - (-3x) = 7x^3 + 7x - 6x^3 + 3x$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Collect the $x^3$ terms and the $x$ terms separately:
  • $x^3$ terms: $7x^3 - 6x^3 = x^3$
  • $x$ terms: $7x + 3x = 10x$
The simplified expression is $x^3 + 10x$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
